nasb.text: and over them three commissioners (of whom Daniel was one), that these satraps might be accountable to them, and that the king might not suffer loss.

esv.text: and over them three high officials, of whom Daniel was one, to whom these satraps should give account, so that the king might suffer no loss.

cnv.text: 他又在這些總督之上，設立三位監察司，監管總督的工作，免得王受虧損。

ccb.text: 总督之上，设三个总长，以维护王的统治，但以理是其中之一。
